expect: Direction accuracy >75%, underconfidence ratio <5:1. Prior S439: ratio was ~6:1.
diff: Underconfidence ratio worsened from ~6:1 to 8.1:1 — target <5:1 NOT MET. Hit rate improving (56→63%). The ratio is not a calibration defect but a measurement of collective capacity.
